name: Local Lead Radar - Daily Scan (Free / OpenStreetMap)

parameters.content:
## Setup checklist (100% FREE - no API key, no card)
1. Set BACKEND_URL in 'Get Config' & 'Save Leads to Backend' nodes
2. In 'Geocode Location' & 'Query Overpass', set the User-Agent header to something identifying you, e.g. 'LocalLeadRadar/1.0 (youremail@example.com)' -- OpenStreetMap asks for this, it's free either way
3. Add SMTP/Gmail credentials in 'Send Email'
4. Activate workflow. Cron runs daily at 08:00.
5. Copy the Webhook node's Production URL into the dashboard's 'n8n Webhook URL' field

Data source: OpenStreetMap (Nominatim geocoding + Overpass API search). No signup, no billing account, no card needed. Coverage/detail (phone, website) can be thinner than Google in smaller cities -- that's the trade-off for zero cost.

parameters.subject: =Aaj ke {{$json.leads.length}} naye leads - Local Lead Radar
